summary: The VibeCoding Project is a multi-faceted software system featuring an AI-driven VS Code extension that orchestrates surgical code edits and patches. It also includes a Contact Center as a Service (CCaaS) backend built with Node.js, Express, and Socket.io to handle real-time agent routing and customer interactions.
suggestedEnhancements: Integrate automated unit test execution within the SmartEditor to validate AI-driven code patches before they are applied to the project files.
Implement a robust message broker such as Redis or RabbitMQ in the CCaaS engine to scale WebSocket connections and ensure reliable agent state recovery.
Develop 'demo.py' into a comprehensive demonstration script or end-to-end integration test suite to showcase the system's capabilities.

files.name: demo.py
files.purpose: This is an empty Python file that currently performs no operations.

files.name: complex.ts
files.purpose: Provides a SmartEditor class that orchestrates AI-driven, surgical code modifications by planning edits, generating patches, and updating specific files in a VS Code workspace.

issues.description: Using the global Node.js Buffer is discouraged for VS Code extensions that might run in a web context; consider using TextDecoder instead.
The file is truncated mid-statement ('const aiResponse = await t'), resulting in invalid syntax.
